castle.strategic_description: This civ has strong infantry for frontline pressure, with Warrior Priest serving as the backbone of siege-backed pushes. Anti-cavalry options are limited -- beware of knight-heavy opponents. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. An infantry ram push is the signature play -- use Warrior Priest as a meatshield to protect rams pushing into enemy bases.

imperial.strategic_description: This civ has strong infantry for frontline pressure, with Champion serving as the backbone of siege-backed pushes. Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Halberdier to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Vulnerable to massed archers -- consider aggressive play before ranged compositions develop. Siege options are limited -- look to win through open-field engagements rather than pushing fortifications.

Vulnerable to massed archers -- consider aggressive play before ranged compositions develop. Bombard Cannons provide long-range siege power for breaking through fortified positions.

castle.strategic_description: This civ is versatile, with strength across cavalry and ranged -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Can answer enemy cavalry with mobile options like Battle Elephant, allowing counter-raids and flexible responses. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. Solid siege options give flexibility in how to close out games.

imperial.strategic_description: This civ has strong ranged options for concentrated pushes, with Elite Rattan Archer providing range advantage and sustained damage output. Excellent anti-cavalry options from both stable and barracks -- very hard for cavalry-heavy opponents to find an opening. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. Bombard Cannons provide long-range siege power for breaking through fortified positions.

castle.strategic_description: This civ has strong infantry for frontline pressure, with Berserk serving as the backbone of siege-backed pushes. Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Pikeman to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. An infantry ram push is the signature play -- use Berserk as a meatshield to protect rams pushing into enemy bases.

imperial.strategic_description: This civ has strong infantry for frontline pressure, with Elite Berserk serving as the backbone of siege-backed pushes. Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Pikeman to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. Siege options are limited -- look to win through open-field engagements rather than pushing fortifications.

Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Pikeman to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. Solid siege options give flexibility in how to close out games.

Vulnerable to massed archers -- consider aggressive play before ranged compositions develop. Bombard Cannons provide long-range siege power for breaking through fortified positions.

Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Pikeman to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. An infantry ram push is the signature play -- use Jian Swordsman as a meatshield to protect rams pushing into enemy bases.

imperial.strategic_description: This civ has strong ranged options for concentrated pushes, with Elite Fire Archer providing range advantage and sustained damage output. Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Halberdier to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Vulnerable to massed archers -- consider aggressive play before ranged compositions develop. Bombard Cannons provide long-range siege power for breaking through fortified positions.
